title: collania urceolata
intro: Collania urceolata is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Collania urceolata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Collania urceolata are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
